amenities.name: Jaffe Art Theatre
amenities.shortDescription: An official Landmark by the New York Landmarks Preservation Commission, the Village East Cinema’s historic auditorium opened in 1926 as the Jaffe Art Theatre, and has been a celebrated arts space in the heart of the East Village since that time. The intricate Moorish Revival design and dual-level auditorium gives audiences a truly unique moviegoing experience. After undergoing a restoration in 2015, the auditorium was honored by the  National Society of Registered Architects.
